network_services.name: Victorian Big Battery
network_services.price_notes: Annual SIPS service fee not publicly disclosed. Availability payment, not $/MWh. Recovered from Victorian transmission customers via AEMO.
network_services.tenor_description: SIPS contract runs from commissioning (December 2021) until 2032 (~11 years).
network_services.volume_structure: 250 MW of 300 MW / 450 MWh battery reserved for AEMO SIPS during summer months; Neoen retains 50 MW in summer and full 300 MW outside summer for market trading.

sources.title: AEMO — Victorian battery ready to deliver energy reserves this summer
Background on Victorian Big Battery and SIPS — WattClarity

network_services.name: Waratah Super Battery
network_services.price_notes: Specific contract value not publicly disclosed. AER revenue determination governs cost recovery. Not an LTESA; procured outside standard NSW LTESA tender.
network_services.tenor_description: 5.5-year SIPS contract. Partial commercial operation from ~August 2025; full operation expected in 2026.
network_services.volume_structure: ~700 MW of 850 MW / 1680 MWh battery reserved for SIPS shock-absorber service (balance available for market trading).

sources.title: AER — Waratah Super Battery SIPS battery service

network_services.name: Torrens Island BESS
network_services.price_notes: No disclosed SA Government PPA or tolling agreement. SA Government support limited to planning fast-tracking. AEMO did not conclude a SIPS-style contract with SA batteries.
network_services.volume_structure: No SA Government offtake contract disclosed; AGL merchant/self-dispatched.

sources.title: AGL opens 250 MW grid-scale battery at Torrens Island — AGL

network_services.name: Western Downs Battery - Stage 1 And 2
network_services.developer: Western Downs BESS Pty Ltd as trustee for Western Downs BESS Trust
network_services.price_notes: No publicly-disclosed CleanCo offtake for the battery; publicly-named battery tolling counterparties are AGL, Shell Energy and ENGIE
network_services.tenor_description: No public CleanCo battery offtake identified; possible data error or undisclosed agreement

sources.title: Neoen signs 200 MW virtual battery contract with AGL for Stage 2
Neoen delivers Western Downs Battery Stage 2 and launches Stage 3
